pr.title: Improve matching across multiple source files
pr.author: fjooord

summary: Large multi-file matching PR touching 95 files across Melee, sysdolphin baselib, and Dolphin THP code. The PR reports 36 new matches, 117 unmatched-item improvements, 0 broken matches, 0 fuzzy/metric regressions, and review cleanup that converted a goto dispatch to a grouped switch, removed register/optimizer-pragma/M2C_FIELD additions, and restored inline literals.

key_files.role: THP decoder matching work; diff shows temporary view structs and typed offset views for MCU buffers, restart fields, predDC fields, and decode output pointers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDec.c adds THPMCURowFields, THPFileInfoMCUBufferView, THPFileInfoDCTCompY/U/VView and rewrites __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480/NxN accesses
pr_body: THPDec __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480 listed as +92 byte unmatched improvement

key_files.role: Camera matching cleanup using condition folding, direct struct member access, stack/local lifetime changes, and priority calculation restructuring.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002B3D4 rewrites abs-threshold checks; fn_800301D0 hoists s64 locals and removes nested blocks

key_files.role: Fighter common dispatch matching; reviewed goto/branch structure was identified as likely switch-like and later converted to grouped switch per author comment.
evidence_refs: review_comment r3366745908: reviewer suggested one or more big switch statements
issuecomment-4639215037: author says reviewed ftCo_09F7 goto dispatch converted into grouped switch

issuecomment-4639215037: author says literals restored and added optimizer pragma removed in gm_1832.c
pr_body: fn_8018325C listed as +163 byte unmatched improvement

evidence_refs: review_comment r3366753658: revert changes as less readable and resolvable during linking
issuecomment-4639215037: author says inline float/string literals restored in gm_1A4C.c

evidence_refs: issuecomment-4639215037: author says inline float/string literals restored in gmregclear.c
pr_body: gmregclear .bss listed as +64 byte unmatched improvement

evidence_refs: issuecomment-4639215037: author says new M2C_FIELD usage removed in grinishie1.c

key_files.role: Baselib particle type fix; author reports targeted object build and full regression check after context-slot type fix.
evidence_refs: changed_files metadata: particle.c added 33 deleted 28 hunks 7
issuecomment-4636635584: local verification after particle context-slot type fix

key_files.role: Baselib data match progress; PR reports axdriver .data as largest new section match.
Large library audio matching changes; PR reports two lbaudio_ax functions as new matches.
evidence_refs: metadata changed_files: lbaudio_ax.c added 192 deleted 142 hunks 3
pr_body: fn_800253D8 and fn_800256BC listed as new matches

what_changed: Changed 95 files with 1408 additions and 1441 deletions according to PR activity metadata.
Reported progress: 36 new matches, including 34 functions and 2 sections; 117 unmatched-item improvements; 0 broken matches; 0 metric regressions.
Largest reported new matches included sysdolphin/baselib/axdriver .data, melee/ft/ft_0852 .bss, grOldYoshi_8020EC10, fn_80165AC0, and two lbaudio_ax functions.
Largest reported unmatched improvements included itseakneedlethrown .data, gm_1832 fn_8018325C, THPDec __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480, grOnett_801E43E0, and gmregclear .bss.

Diff excerpt shows THPDec replacing some global/field accesses with local typed view structs and casts for MCU row fields, MCU buffer pointers, restart fields, decode pointers, and per-component predDC storage.
Diff excerpt shows camera.c matching-oriented restructuring of local padding/order, conditionals, struct-member access through cam->transform, and local lifetime/block shape.

Author reports review cleanup: ftCo_09F7 goto dispatch converted to grouped switch; register usage removed in ftCo_Bury.c and gm_19EF.c; inline literals restored in ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, gm_1A4C.c, gmregclear.c, and ifprize.c; optimizer pragma removed in gm_1832.c; new M2C_FIELD removed in grinishie1.c.
smart_moves: The PR separated local orchestrator artifacts from the Melee PR scope, explicitly keeping decomp-orchestrator files out of the change.
Author posted targeted verification after the particle context-slot type fix, including particle.o build, full ninja, and changes_all regression check.
Review cleanup addressed readability and source-style concerns before final reported verification.
The ftCo_09F7 dispatch was not left as reviewed goto-like generated structure; the author states it was converted into a grouped switch while preserving matching behavior.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled dispatch resembles a broad branch/goto ladder, try a grouped switch before accepting the generated shape.
Do not use register, asm, or similar steering keywords as ordinary matching cleanup; reviewers requested removal in this PR.
For code-matching PRs, keep ordinary string and float constants inline unless data ownership evidence justifies named storage; reviewer said these will be resolved during linking.
Optimizer pragmas need strong justification and narrow scope; a newly added global_optimizer pragma in gm_1832.c was explicitly requested for removal.
New M2C_FIELD usage should be treated as bridge code and removed when review cleanup can express the access without it.

naming_conventions.convention: Use clearer local semantic names when the role is directly visible in code, such as gfx_id replacing an argument-name use in the ftCo_09F7 reviewed hunk.
evidence_refs: review_comment r3366745908 diff hunk shows arg1 changed to gfx_id in efAsync_Spawn call

naming_conventions.convention: Do not rename inline asset strings into address-style globals solely for linking/data order; reviewer preferred keeping literal names readable in arrays and calls.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use grouped switch forms for large adjacent dispatches when review identifies switch-like control flow.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Evidence only states the reviewed ftCo_09F7 dispatch was converted and preserved matching behavior; exact final switch code is not included in the loaded excerpt.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For THPDec, the diff uses temporary typed view structs and casts to access fields at known offsets, reducing some raw/global access mismatches while preserving offset-sensitive codegen.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is a PR-specific tactic from the diff, not a global endorsement of padded view structs without verifier evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Camera matching used local declaration order, local lifetime, padding adjustment, and direct base-struct member access changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: camera.c Camera_80029CF8 and fn_800301D0 hunks
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: These are observed tactics; loaded evidence does not prove which individual local/order changes were necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Avoid broad data/literal symbol churn when text matching can land without it; reviewer requested reverting readability-harming literal-to-symbol edits.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Supported by review comments on specific files, not by a full final diff audit.

Diff and review comment files are truncated; only loaded hunks can support file-specific tactics.
Changed-files evidence states 95 files, but loaded changed_files excerpt is truncated, so key_files lists representative and review-relevant files rather than every changed file.

A bot report excerpt in text_corpus mentions one stale regression, while PR body says the older bot report was superseded and final report had 0 regressions; this record follows the PR body for final claimed status but notes it is author-reported.
Review intent is limited to the literal comments shown; no unsupported reviewer rationale beyond those comments is inferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try switch forms for switch-like goto dispatches
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2583, reviewer jurrejelle identified ftCo_09F7 branch/goto dispatch as likely one or more big switch statements; author later reported converting the reviewed dispatch into a grouped switch while preserving matching behavior.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Avoid register/asm-style steering keywords in reviewable decomp C
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2583 review explicitly rejected register usage in ftCo_Bury.c and gm_19EF.c; author reported removing those uses.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep ordinary constants inline instead of naming literals for link/data parity
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2583 review rejected replacing inline strings/floats with named symbols in ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, and gm_1A4C.c; author reported restoring inline float/string literals in ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, gm_1A4C.c, gmregclear.c, and ifprize.c.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2583 reinforces existing no-register/pragma exception guidance
source_update_candidates.text: Review comments in PR 2583 explicitly requested removing register keywords and an added global_optimizer pragma. Current standards already cover this under avoid-pragmas-register-asm; curator may link PR 2583 as historical supporting evidence rather than creating a new standard.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source update is only to add this PR as an example/evidence reference; the standard itself already exists in loaded decomp_standards.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2583 reinforces existing inline-literal/data-ownership standards
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer feedback in PR 2583 said constants like strings and floats should remain inline and that such references will be resolved during linking. This aligns with existing literals-and-data-ownership, no-string-literal-symbol-regression, and text-before-data-matching standards.
source_update_candidates.reason: Use as historical evidence/example if curator wants more citations; do not add as a novel rule because loaded standards already contain the concept.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2583 reinforces switch cleanup for generated branch ladders
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer suggested ftCo_09F7 looked like one or more big switch statements, and author reported converting a goto dispatch into a grouped switch. This aligns with canonical-control-flow-and-macros.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential example citation for an existing standard; final code was not fully loaded, so avoid over-specific path fact promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the THPDec temporary view-struct pattern as a global best practice; loaded evidence only shows it in this PR and current standards prefer real typed fields when recoverable.
Do not claim all 95 changed files individually inspected; the loaded changed_files and diff artifacts are truncated.
Do not claim independent validation beyond PR-reported ninja, changes_all, and CI results.
Do not infer that every review comment was resolved from final diff; resolution evidence is the author's cleanup comment plus PR body saying review threads were resolved.
